title: Caramelized Crunchy American Carrot Crumble
description: A rich and crunchy vegan treat featuring caramelized carrots with a touch of white wine vinegar for extra depth.
instructions: Wash and peel the baby carrots. Halve them lengthwise if desired, but leave them whole for a rustic look.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a baking sheet with vegan butter.
Arrange the carrot halves on the prepared sheet. Drizzle each half with lemon juice and sprinkle evenly with granulated sugar and salt.
Drizzle additional vegan butter over the carrots, ensuring they are all coated. Sprinkle more white wine vinegar on top of the butter coating for caramelization.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and the edges start to crisp up. Carefully flip each half and bake an additional 15 minutes.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving. The carvets can be served warm as a side dish or cooled to room temperature and enjoyed on its own for a crunchy treat.
Optional: Serve with a dollop of vegan whipped cream or coconut yogurt for added richness.
